name: recoil_app_create_main_wnd
description: RecoilApp::CreateMainWnd allocates a CZRecoilFrame and dispatches its constructor.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT COFF byte compare currently fails for recoil_app_create_main_wnd: 82 unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 90 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 7 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed byte drift is dominated by original EH frame setup and allocation cleanup shape versus the current compact VC object body that tail-jumps to CZRecoilFrame::Constructor.

The native smoke constructs the global RecoilApp, initializes MFC, registers the RecoilClass window class, uses test-local CWnd providers to avoid placeholder-vtable MFC dispatch, calls RecoilApp::CreateMainWnd, and verifies a constructed frame plus constructor side effects.
